meta.packName: Synthetic GOAD-style lab demo (not from a live scan)
meta.note: Fictional findings for Attack Path / LLM testing only.

results.Description: User backup_svc does not require pre-authentication (DONT_REQ_PREAUTH). Ticket-granting material can be requested without a password for offline cracking.
results.Impact: Attacker in same broadcast domain can obtain AS-REP for backup_svc and attempt hash crack to recover NTLM.

results.Description: Multiple user accounts with SPNs and weak password policy in OU=LegacyApps — classic Kerberoast surface.
results.Impact: Cracked TGS hashes for sqlagent_svc or iis_svc may yield lateral movement into application tiers.
results.RiskData: Sample SPN: MSSQLSvc/sql01.corp.local:1433 mapped to sqlagent_svc

results.Description: Computer account WEB01$ has TRUSTED_FOR_DELEGATION. Combined with coerced auth, TGT forwarding risk to Tier-1 assets.
results.Impact: If WEB01 is compromised, attacker may capture delegated TGTs for users authenticating to the host.

results.Description: Service account app_pool_svc has constrained delegation to CIFS/FILE01.corp.local and LDAP/DC01.corp.local.
results.Impact: Stolen app_pool_svc TGS could be used within allowed SPNs to reach file shares and directory reads.

results.CheckName: GenericAll on Domain Users to sensitive group
results.Description: Non-privileged group HelpDesk has GenericAll on group Server-Admins (memberOf path to Tier-1).
results.Impact: HelpDesk members can add themselves or allies to Server-Admins and pivot toward server tier.

results.Description: Group Interns has WriteDacl on GPO Default Domain Policy (inherited unusual ACE).
results.Impact: Ability to alter password policy or logon scripts domain-wide if abused.

results.Description: SYSVOL XML under Policies contains cpassword attribute for local admin push to workstations OU.
results.Impact: Decryptable group policy preferences may reveal local administrator password across many hosts.

results.CheckName: Logon script runs from writable share
results.Description: User logon script points to NETLOGON share path writable by broad group Authenticated Users.
results.Impact: Script tampering could run code at next user logon within scope of GPO.

results.Description: Template WebServerVuln has enrollee-supplied SAN and client auth EKU; enrollment open to Domain Users in lab CA.
results.Impact: Forged certificates for arbitrary identities if enrollment succeeds — Certified Pre-Owned style path.

results.Description: Non-admin principal has WriteProperty on certificate template object for SmartCardLogon clone.
results.Impact: Template flags could be altered to weaken enrollment constraints.

results.Description: LDAP signing not enforced on legacy DC binding; LLMNR enabled on subnet with mixed Win7 clients.
results.Impact: Relay and downgrade opportunities for credential capture on same broadcast segment.

results.Description: Account legacy_app has reversible encryption enabled for compatibility.
results.Impact: Domain admin recovery of plaintext-equivalent material if AD database access is achieved.

results.Description: Tier-0 adjacent account krbtgt_shadow not in Protected Users; long TGT lifetime.
results.Impact: Stolen credentials remain usable longer than hardened baseline.
results.RiskData: Account used for backup automation to DC

results.Description: WinRM listeners on servers allow * from 10.0.10.0/24 without IPsec in lab segment.
results.Impact: Broad lateral movement surface if any workstation in range is compromised.

results.Description: Account schema_editor last logon 800 days ago still member of Schema Admins.
results.Impact: Dormant highly privileged account suitable for persistence if credentials recoverable.

results.Description: Authenticated Users can create child records under sensitive DNS zone _msdcs.
results.Impact: Potential spoofing or redirection in misconfigured resolver scenarios.

results.CheckName: SMB signing off on file server
results.Description: FILE01 offers SMB without message signing required for session from domain members.
results.Impact: Relay to SMB if NTLM is exposed elsewhere.

results.Description: Account exsvc has WriteDacl on multiple mail-enabled security groups including Organization Management (lab).
results.Impact: Path from mail tier to broad directory changes if exsvc is compromised.

results.Description: MSOL account has unexpected membership in Domain Admins in lab (misconfiguration).
results.Impact: Cloud sync account could be used for full domain takeover if credential is obtained.

results.Description: Analyst note: AS-REP user backup_svc in same OU as Kerberoastable sqlagent_svc; WEB01 unconstrained delegation reachable from 10.0.10.0/24 WinRM.
results.Impact: Demonstrates overlapping paths: credential theft → delegation abuse → tier escalation in lab narrative.
results.RiskData: Synthetic chain for LLM demo only
